vulnerability.title: Install AIDE
vulnerability.description: The aide package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install aide
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then if ! rpm -q --quiet "aide" ; then dnf install -y "aide" fi else >&2 echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' fi

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only installs the aide package using dnf, which is a standard, low‑impact operation that does not modify authentication, networking, or boot configurations. Package installation is explicitly listed as safe to remediate in the policy.
